normalization_notes: official Sintel PNG frames converted to normalized RGB in [0,1]
current-grid backward motion vectors derived by inverting official forward flow; derived-high-confidence
official Sintel depth for the current frame, with previous depth reprojected onto the current frame
notes: Current color is native Sintel final pass.
Motion vectors are derived by inverting official forward flow onto the current pixel grid.
Depth is native Sintel depth; normals are derived from depth.
ROI support is derived from motion-boundary and depth-discontinuity structure because Sintel provides no native ROI.
The clean pass is written as a proxy reference only and is not claimed as renderer ground truth.
